topic: Hingoli earthquake damages 105 houses in Maharashtra
summary: A 4.7 magnitude earthquake struck Hingoli district in Maharashtra, causing minor structural damage and affecting 105 houses, but no casualties have been reported. The earthquake occurred in a region that has experienced significant seismic activity in the past, including the 1993 Latur earthquake that resulted in significant loss of life and damage. The recent earthquake has not caused any loss of life, but has resulted in damage to homes in the area.
